item.title: Didn’t see that one coming
item.dc:creator: wadatahmydamie

item.title: If you need you HEART UPLIFTED today, this dump is just for you (Saturday things that make me smile)
item.description:
1. Hope we all are amazing dads
2. Smooth
3
4. Grand parents finding out that they have twins
5. Little fren
6. This dog's favorite part of the day is when the mailman comes around
7. So a logical way to die is when you approach to pet this furry fren shaped fren
8
9. Still got it
10.
11. If this thing can run DOOM too, we are set for life
12. Finding out she was accepted to Yale with a full ride
13. Is this dog for Leroyyyy Jenkins?
14. Why does this filter go so well with this cat?
15. Today I wanted to share with you that I started reading this awesome book called Blood, Sweat & Pixels. It's about the history of various indie and mainstream games and the struggle of the devs to get them done. I TRULY RECOMMEND! I have to say it's very inspiring and it helps me on my own journey as a game dev. To be honest, I've been working on the same game for almost 18 months now and it can get a bit frustrating. Imagine having to hold your focus on one thing for so long (while juggling everyday life). However this book inspired me and helped me re-start my passion. Anyway, if you want to support the game, a simple wishlist would mean the world to me. Please check it out on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ P.S. 1. This here is a plushie duck that I'm hoping a lot of players will develop affection for. P.S. 2 HAVE A GREAT AND SUNNY WEEKEEND, FRIENDOS!

item.title: 1 Oodle of Unmuted Faves
item.description:
Such grace!
Song by Rachel Bloom - full version here: https://youtu.be/zgUKQCVieWM?si=1NdDzd0ZwRdBTjlf
French Fuse https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzLFySnc_T_qFHAJ2HTWUTw
Aries Spears https://www.ariesspears.com/
Atlas, the most fantastic meower of imgurian @friendlynoodles! Upvotes go here: https://imgur.com/gallery/atlas-face-vs-his-voice-rWi7rWF
Les Fo'Plafonds https://lesfoplafonds.com/
Gary Meikle https://www.garymeikle.com/
--- For more unmuted faves just click on the #oodles tag

item.title: The dog was in on it

item.dc:creator: AllAnusMorissette

item.title: Don't be Kevin
item.description: So, dude at the gas station asked for my number. Sure wanna get a drink when you get off? He responds in the affirmative. Meets me at the bar. We had fun, but he started to get weird. We were both walking. So I said goodnight and walked home. He offered to get me an Uber I said thanks but no and walked away. Heard him yelling FUCK as I walked away. I was drunk. But I've never been lost in a field drunk. Had to call a friend who stayed on the phone with me while I finally navigated home. I wonder if i was really just that plastered or if there was something else in my drink. Then he spends the entire night texting me. Including the quintessential dick pic. This was... bizarre. He has something in his favor: he didn't contact me after I said "don't contact me.". Props for that. * Update: Because it's been asked, this was in the voice text, "You are heading in your direction. I am heading in mine. That just makes sense. It's been an interesting night. I had fun. Goodnight." I thought it was odd that he sent "Hey beautiful" while I was walking home. So, I responded with a voice text to make it very clear that the night was over. We could talk again when sober. And then... he made some odd drunkin choices.
item.dc:creator: IgnisInvictus

item.title: Happy 524th birthday to the immortal one
item.description: He's claiming to be only 60, but we know better. Seriously though, does this guy age at all? Be excellent to each other!
